title: Tatoo (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tatoo''' was a pair of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]]. They were part of [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] allotted reinforcements, should he require them for his defense of Imperial convoy [[Rope 17]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

[[Category:CR92a Assassin-class corvettes|*]]
